title: notes/qa-workflow-design.md lives in gitignored Notes/ — Read-first link broken on fresh clones
summary: The S092 planning sprint's acceptance criterion and docs/qa/agent.md (landing in S093) both point readers to notes/qa-workflow-design.md as the primary design reference. The file was written to Notes/qa-workflow-design.md, which is gitignored. On any fresh clone or CI system the file is absent, making the Read-first link a dead reference. The actionable QA workflow is fully documented in the committed docs/qa/*.md triad, so the practical impact is limited to discoverability and onboarding friction. Root cause is shared with QA-2026-05-20-001.
repro: Clone the repo fresh (after S093 merges) or check out main on a machine that does not have the local Notes/ folder.
Open docs/qa/agent.md and find the Read-first section.
Observe: the file does not exist — ls notes/qa-workflow-design.md returns 'No such file or directory'.
expected: notes/qa-workflow-design.md is either committed to the repo or the docs/qa/agent.md Read-first section clearly marks it as an optional local-only reference.
actual: The file exists only in the gitignored Notes/ folder on the author's machine. Fresh clones see a dead link with no explanation.
